name: enCore Energy Corp.
description: enCore Energy Corp. is a leading U.S. domestic uranium producer focused on providing clean and reliable fuel for nuclear energy. The company operates the Rosita and Alta Mesa In-Situ Recovery (ISR) plants in Texas and maintains a significant portfolio of uranium assets across the United States, including projects in Wyoming, New Mexico, and South Dakota. As a pioneer in ISR technology, enCore Energy is committed to environmentally responsible extraction methods and plays a critical role in securing the domestic uranium supply chain to support the global transition to carbon-free energy.
